nasb.text: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ, and the love of God, and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit, be with you all.

esv.text: The grace of the Lord Jesus Christ and the love of God and the fellowship of the Holy Spirit be with you all.

cnv.text: 願主耶穌基督的恩惠，　神的慈愛，聖靈的契通，常與你們眾人同在。

ccb.text: 愿主耶稣基督的恩典、上帝的慈爱、圣灵的感动，常与你们众人同在！
